markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and prioritize SentinelOne's CVE database QA sheet.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical Bugs:** The "Published" date filter is broken, failing to reset and showing a misleading active state on page load. The "View All" CTAs also display incorrect results.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**UX Decisions:** The team approved removing checkmarks from selected filters (color highlight is sufficient) and keeping the month/year-only date range filter to simplify the UI.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [**Filter Menu UX:** The current filter menu UX is confusing. The team will explore two solutions: adding an "Apply" button or making the menu background clickable to dismiss it.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [**Future Enhancements:** Key items on the roadmap include adding "Technical References" and "Vendor Resources" to CVE detail pages (pending API support) and making the CVE info table visible on mobile.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

## Topics

### Critical Bugs & Fixes

  - [**"Published" Date Filter (Rows 26-27)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**Problem:** The filter fails to reset on the first click and shows an active state (earliest-to-latest range) on page load, even in incognito mode.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**Action:** George will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [**"View All" CTA Logic (Row 10)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Problem:** "Top Scores" and "High Profile" CTAs incorrectly display all 250 CVEs instead of their filtered subsets.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Action:** George has a fix locally and will push it to staging.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**Mobile Hamburger Menu (Row 18)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Problem:** The close button is missing from the mobile hamburger menu.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Action:** George will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### UX/UI Refinements & Decisions

  - [**Filter Menu UX (Row 23)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current UX is confusing; users must re-click the "Filter" button to apply selections.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
      - [**Solutions to explore:**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
        1.  [**"Apply" Button:** A clear action to confirm selections.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
        2.  [**Click-to-Dismiss:** Make the menu background clickable to close it.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [**Date Range Filter (Row 13)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Decision:** Keep the filter as month/year-only, omitting the day selector to simplify the UI.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Selected Filter Checkmarks (Row 14)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**Decision:** Remove checkmarks; the color highlight is sufficient for indicating selection.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [**Filter Names (Row 11)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Decision:** Use the long, Figma-approved names for now, despite potential readability issues.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**"View All" CTA Text (Row 1)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Problem:** Text color is black, not purple as per Figma.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Action:** George will fix.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Search Bar Copy (Row 23, SEO QA Tab)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [**Action:** George will update the placeholder text to Ankit's new copy.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### CVE Detail Page Enhancements

  - [**Missing Sections (Row 15)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Problem:** "Technical References" and "Vendor Resources" are missing.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Action:** George awaits API support from Marcus, then will style the sections.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Sidebar Content Audit (Row 17)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Problem:** The sidebar is too long.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Action:** George will implement a "show more" feature (hiding items \>3). Ankit suggested simplifying the date display to show only the "Discovery Date."](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [**CVE Info Table on Mobile (Row 25, SEO QA Tab)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
      - [**Decision:** Make the table visible on mobile, placed after the hero section.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### SEO & Internal Linking

  - [**"Related CVEs" Section (Row 24, SEO QA Tab)**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**Problem:** This section is critical for SEO's topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**Status:** On the roadmap, but deferred until critical bugs are fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [Fix "Published" filter bugs (reset and default state).](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [Push "View All" CTA logic fix to staging.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [Investigate missing mobile hamburger menu close button.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Fix "View All" CTA text color.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Update search bar placeholder copy.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Implement "show more" feature for long sidebar lists.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [Style "Technical References" and "Vendor Resources" once API is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Ankit:**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [Gather feedback on the "Related CVEs" section priority.](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
      - [Decide on the final filter menu UX (Apply button vs. click-to-dismiss).](https://fathom.video/share/uPqnHsBiukrL1QnodF-tEnkuUrseAWof?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
